revision.text:
<!--If you add people to this box, please be sure to also add this box to their article!-->{{Navbox | name = Japanese princesses by marriage | title = [[Japanese princesses by marriage|{{color|#FFFFFF|Japanese princesses by marriage}}]] | image = [[File:Japan Kouzoku Flag 16ben.svg|80px|link=|alt=]] | state = {{{state|<includeonly>collapsed</includeonly>}}} | basestyle = background:#CC0033; color:#FFFFFF; {{box-shadow border|a|#BFA648|2px}} | abovestyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | belowstyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | listclass = hlist
| above = Generations are numbered from the daughter-in-law of [[Emperor Meiji]]
| group1 = 1st generation | list1 = * [[Empress Teimei|Sadako Kujō]]
| group2 = 2nd generation | list2 = * [[Empress Nagako|Princess Nagako of Kuni]]* * [[Setsuko, Princess Chichibu|Setsuko Matsudaira]] * [[Kikuko, Princess Takamatsu|Kikuko Tokugawa]] * [[Yuriko, Princess Mikasa|Yuriko Takagi]]
| group3 = 3rd generation | list3 = * [[Empress Michiko|Michiko Shōda]] * [[Hanako, Princess Hitachi|Hanako Tsugaru]] * [[Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Nobuko Asō]] * [[Hisako, Princess Takamado|Hisako Tottori]]
| group4 = 4th generation | list4 = * [[Empress Masako|Masako Owada]] * [[Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|Kiko Kawashima]]
| below = ''* also a princess of [[Japan]] in her own right.''
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]] [[Category:Princesses by marriage templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
revision.text:
<!--If you add people to this box, please be sure to also add this box to their article!-->{{Navbox | name = Japanese princesses by marriage | title = [[Japanese princesses by marriage|{{color|#FFFFFF|Japanese princesses by marriage}}]] | image = [[File:Japan Kouzoku Flag 16ben.svg|80px|link=|alt=]] | state = {{{state|<includeonly>collapsed</includeonly>}}} | basestyle = background:#CC0033; color:#FFFFFF; {{box-shadow border|a|#BFA648|2px}} | abovestyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | belowstyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | listclass = hlist
| above = Generations are numbered from the daughter-in-law of [[Emperor Meiji]]
| group1 = 1st generation | list1 = * [[Empress Teimei|Sadako Kujō]]
| group2 = 2nd generation | list2 = * [[Empress Nagako|Princess Nagako of Kuni]]* * [[Setsuko, Princess Chichibu|Setsuko Matsudaira]] * [[Kikuko, Princess Takamatsu|Kikuko Tokugawa]] * [[Yuriko, Princess Mikasa|Yuriko Takagi]]
| group3 = 3rd generation | list3 = * [[Empress Michiko|Michiko Shōda]] * [[Hanako, Princess Hitachi|Hanako Tsugaru]] * [[Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Nobuko Asō]] * [[Hisako, Princess Takamado|Hisako Tottori]]
| group4 = 4th generation | list4 = * [[Empress Masako|Masako Owada]] * [[Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|Kiko Kawashima]]
| below = ''* also a princess of [[Japan]] in her own right.''
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]] [[Category:Princesses by marriage templates]] </noinclude>

<!--If you add people to this box, please be sure to also add this box to their article!-->{{Navbox | name = Japanese princesses by marriage | title = [[Japanese princesses by marriage|{{color|#FFFFFF|Japanese princesses by marriage}}]] | image = [[File:Japan Kouzoku Flag 16ben.svg|80px|link=|alt=]] | state = {{{state|<includeonly>collapsed</includeonly>}}} | basestyle = background:#CC0033; color:#FFFFFF; {{box-shadow border|a|#BFA648|2px}} | abovestyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | belowstyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | listclass = hlist
| above = Generations are numbered from the daughter-in-law of [[Emperor Meiji]]
| group1 = 1st generation | list1 = * [[Empress Teimei|Sadako Kujō]]
| group2 = 2nd generation | list2 = * [[Empress Nagako|Princess Nagako of Kuni]]* * [[Setsuko, Princess Chichibu|Setsuko Matsudaira]] * [[Kikuko, Princess Takamatsu|Kikuko Tokugawa]] * [[Yuriko, Princess Mikasa|Yuriko Takagi]]
| group3 = 3rd generation | list3 = * [[Empress Michiko|Michiko Shōda]] * [[Hanako, Princess Hitachi|Hanako Tsugaru]] * [[Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Nobuko Asō]] * [[Hisako, Princess Takamado|Hisako Tottori]]
| group4 = 4th generation | list4 = * [[Empress Masako|Masako Owada]] * [[Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|Kiko Kawashima]]
| below = ''* also a princess of [[Japan]] in her own right.''
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]]
</noinclude>

| group2 = 2nd generation | list2 = * [[Empress Nagako|Princess Nagako of Kuni]]* * [[Setsuko, Princess Chichibu|Setsuko Matsudaira]] * [[Kikuko, Princess Takamatsu|Kikuko Tokugawa]] * [[Yuriko, Princess Mikasa|Yuriko Takagi]]

| group3 = 3rd generation | list3 = * [[:en:Empress Michiko|Michiko Shōda]] * [[:en:Hanako, Princess Hitachi|Hanako Tsugaru]] * [[:en:Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Nobuko Asō]] * [[:en:Hisako, Princess Takamado|Hisako Tottori]]
| group4 = 4th generation | list4 = * [[Empress Masako|Masako Owada]] * [[:en:Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|Kiko Kawashima]]
| below = ''* also a princess of [[:en:Japan|Japan]] in her own right.''
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<!--If you add people to this box, please be sure to also add this box to their article!-->{{Navbox | name = Japanese princesses by marriage | title = [[Japanese princesses by marriage|{{color|#FFFFFF|Japanese princesses by marriage}}]] | image = [[File:Japan Kouzoku Flag 16ben.svg|80px|link=|alt=]] | state = {{{state|<includeonly>collapsed</includeonly>}}} | basestyle = background:#CC0033; color:#FFFFFF; {{box-shadow border|a|#BFA648|2px}} | abovestyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | belowstyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | listclass = hlist
| above = Generations are numbered from the daughter-in-law of [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]]
| group1 = 1st generation | list1 = * [[:en:Empress Teimei|Sadako Kujō]]
| group2 = 2nd generation | list2 = * [[:en:Empress Nagako|Princess Nagako of Kuni]]* * [[:en:Setsuko, Princess Chichibu|Setsuko Matsudaira]] * [[:en:Kikuko, Princess Takamatsu|Kikuko Tokugawa]] * [[:en:Yuriko, Princess Mikasa|Yuriko Takagi]]
| group3 = 3rd generation | list3 = * [[:en:Empress Michiko|Michiko Shōda]] * [[:en:Hanako, Princess Hitachi|Hanako Tsugaru]] * [[:en:Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Nobuko Asō]] * [[:en:Hisako, Princess Takamado|Hisako Tottori]]
| group4 = 4th generation | list4 = * [[Empress Masako|Masako Owada]] * [[:en:Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|Kiko Kawashima]]
| below = ''* also a princess of [[:en:Japan|Japan]] in her own right.''
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]]
</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<!--If you add people to this box, please be sure to also add this box to their article!-->{{Navbox | name = Japanese princesses by marriage | title = [[Japanese princesses by marriage|{{color|#FFFFFF|Japanese princesses by marriage}}]] | image = [[File:Japan Kouzoku Flag 16ben.svg|80px|link=|alt=]] | state = {{{state|<includeonly>collapsed</includeonly>}}} | basestyle = background:#CC0033; color:#FFFFFF; {{box-shadow border|a|#BFA648|2px}} | abovestyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | belowstyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | listclass = hlist
| above = Generations are numbered from the daughter-in-law of [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]]
| group1 = 1st generation | list1 = * [[:en:Empress Teimei|Sadako Kujō]]
| group2 = 2nd generation | list2 = * [[:en:Empress Nagako|Princess Nagako of Kuni]]* * [[:en:Setsuko, Princess Chichibu|Setsuko Matsudaira]] * [[:en:Kikuko, Princess Takamatsu|Kikuko Tokugawa]] * [[:en:Yuriko, Princess Mikasa|Yuriko Takagi]]
| group3 = 3rd generation | list3 = * [[:en:Empress Michiko|Michiko Shōda]] * [[:en:Hanako, Princess Hitachi|Hanako Tsugaru]] * [[:en:Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Nobuko Asō]] * [[:en:Hisako, Princess Takamado|Hisako Tottori]]
| group4 = 4th generation | list4 = * [[Empress Masako|Masako Owada]] * [[:en:Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|Kiko Kawashima]]
| below = ''* also a princess of [[:en:Japan|Japan]] in her own right.''
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]]
</noinclude>

| group2 = 2nd generation | list2 = * [[:en:Empress Nagako|Princess Nagako of Kuni]]* * [[:en:Setsuko, Princess Chichibu|Setsuko Matsudaira]] * [[:en:Kikuko, Princess Takamatsu|Kikuko Tokugawa]] * [[:en:Yuriko, Princess Mikasa|Yuriko Takagi]]

| group2 = 2nd generation | list2 = * [[:en:Empress Nagako|Princess Nagako of Kuni]]* * [[:en:Setsuko, Princess Chichibu|Setsuko Matsudaira]] * [[:en:Kikuko, Princess Takamatsu|Kikuko Tokugawa]] * [[:en:Yuriko, Princess Mikasa|Yuriko Takagi]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Japanese princesses by marriage | title = [[Japanese princesses by marriage|{{color|#FFFFFF|Japanese princesses by marriage}}]] | image = [[File:Japan Kouzoku Flag 16ben.svg|80px|link=|alt=]] | state = {{{state|<includeonly>collapsed</includeonly>}}} | basestyle = background:#CC0033; color:#FFFFFF; {{box-shadow border|a|#BFA648|2px}} | abovestyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | belowstyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | listclass = hlist

| group1 = 1st generation | list1 = * [[:en:Empress Teimei|Sadako Kujō]]
| group2 = 2nd generation | list2 = * [[:en:Empress Nagako|Princess Nagako of Kuni]]* * [[:en:Setsuko, Princess Chichibu|Setsuko Matsudaira]] * [[:en:Kikuko, Princess Takamatsu|Kikuko Tokugawa]] * [[:en:Yuriko, Princess Mikasa|Yuriko Takagi]]
| group3 = 3rd generation | list3 = * [[:en:Empress Michiko|Michiko Shōda]] * [[:en:Hanako, Princess Hitachi|Hanako Tsugaru]] * [[:en:Princess Tomohito of Mikasa|Nobuko Asō]] * [[:en:Hisako, Princess Takamado|Hisako Tottori]]
| group4 = 4th generation | list4 = * [[Empress Masako|Masako Owada]] * [[:en:Kiko, Crown Princess of Japan|Kiko Kawashima]]
| below = ''* also a princess of [[:en:Japan|Japan]] in her own right.''
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Princesses by marriage]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
